mapper.select: select warehouse_id, ent_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, manager_name, manager_phone, warehouse_address, sort_num, status, remark, create_time, update_time from t_material_warehouse where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_material_warehouse (warehouse_id, ent_code, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, manager_name, manager_phone, warehouse_address, sort_num, status, remark) values (#{warehouseId}, #{entCode}, #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{managerName}, #{managerPhone}, #{warehouseAddress}, #{sortNum}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: select coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_stock where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_in_order where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_out_order where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}), 0) + coalesce((select count(*) from t_material_return_order where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}), 0)
